title: (Bullish Signal) RETA, enters Uptrend as Momentum ascends above 0 level on Feb 09, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that RETA's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 75 similar cases where RETA's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 66 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 88%. Current price $122.03 crossed the resistance line at $119.05 and is trading between $128.86 resistance and $119.05 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 01/07/21 - 02/09/21, the price experienced a -5% Downtrend, while the week of 02/02/21 - 02/09/21 shows a +8% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/udan7nrnoog61.png?width=1522&format=png&auto=webp&s=c308703658b910be19efb3f9c01cbad11fa63534

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on February 09, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on RETA as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 66 of 75 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for RETA just turned positive on February 03, 2021. Looking at past instances where RETA's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in  29 of 35 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

Following a +8.27% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where RETA advanced for three days, in 256 of 297 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

RETA may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
